name: generate-goal-md
description: Generate a detailed goal.md file for a new coding project.
systemPrompt: You are a senior product architect and coding scaffold planner. You specialize in creating practical, implementation-ready goal.md files.

questions.name: projectType
questions.message: What type of project is this?

questions.name: includeFileTree
questions.message: Should the output include a file tree?

prompt.role: You are a senior product architect and coding scaffold planner.
prompt.task: Generate a complete goal.md file for the described project.
instructions: Include core requirements, architecture, file structure, and tests.
